Package com.sait.workshop05.controllers

package com.sait.workshop05.controllers
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.sait.workshop05
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ActivityLogController
    Activity log lines from the server log file with admin versus employee filtering.
    BakeryLocationsController
    Staff CRUD for bakery branches and addresses and operating hours with optional image upload.
    ChatController
    Staff customer chat inbox with category filters polling and compose actions toward the web app.
    CustomerManagementController
    Staff customer directory with profile edits and order history and reward tier assignment.
    DashboardController
    Dashboard summary cards and recent orders backed by the dashboard and order APIs.
    EmployeeManagementController
    Staff employee directory create and edit with bakery and address linking.
    LoginController
    Staff login obtains JWT session state then loads the main shell scene.
    MainController
    Root window with sidebar navigation lazy-loaded panes and avatar display hooks.
    MessagingController
    Staff messaging inbox and thread view backed by the messages API.
    OrderManagementController
    Order list filtering status updates and staff checkout with manual discount aligned to server rules.
    ProductManagementController
    Staff product catalog CRUD with optional image upload to blob storage.
    ProductSpecialsController
    Product specials CRUD for featured discounts and dates.
    RewardController
    Read-only loyalty ledger for staff with search and privacy masking on customer fields.
    UserManagementController
    Admin-only user accounts list with create and active toggle workflows.
    UserManagementController.UserRow
